impact: Prevents broad generated replacements for ppd.extraction.sign_permit_requirements by requiring the implementation to remain small, local to ppd/extraction, and dataclass-free.
summary: Add a focused size and dataclass guard for the sign permit requirements extractor.
target_task: Task checkbox-99: Add a one-file replacement-size guard test for `ppd.extraction.sign_permit_requirements` proposals that rejects broad generated modules and requires the extractor implementation to stay under 180 physical lines with no dataclasses.

command: files=$(find ppd -name '*.ts' -not -path '*/node_modules/*' -print); test -z "$files" || npx tsc --noEmit --target ES2020 --module ESNext --moduleResolution node --strict --skipLibCheck --types node $files
